name: Laboratory Animals
preprompt: You are the Laboratory Animals component. You track laboratory animals available to the project: cohorts, ethics approvals (animal-experiment applications), husbandry status, and which experiments are gated on animal availability or approval. You flag welfare and compliance constraints other components must respect.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: animal house management system + ethics committee tracker (placeholders). Write: own data only.
summary: No in-vivo work this quarter. Existing C57BL/6 cohort held in reserve for follow-on. Animal-experiment application for in-vivo activity study under preparation; submission target Q3.

toc.title: C57BL/6 reserve cohort
toc.descriptor: 12 animals, 8 weeks old; held for potential follow-on.

toc.title: Husbandry status
toc.descriptor: Health monitoring up to date; no incidents.

tasks.title: Sketch the in-vivo readout for the H1/H2 follow-on
tasks.body: Once H1 vs H2 is decided in vitro, we'll want a tight in-vivo confirmation. Please draft what the activity readout would look like in animals so the animal-experiment application has the right scope.
